Environmental
Pumping Services

Responsible, compliant environmental waste removal and pumping — handled professionally from start to finish. Serving North Texas with licensed disposal and full documentation.

📞 Call Now
Environmental Services

Handled Right.
Disposed Properly.

Environmental pumping requires more than just a truck and a hose — it requires proper licensing, compliant disposal, and thorough documentation. Direct Pumping handles every job with care for the environment and full accountability to regulatory standards.

  • 🌿
    Waste Holding Tank Pumping — Industrial and commercial holding tanks pumped and transported to licensed disposal facilities.
  • 🏗️
    Construction Site Services — Portable restroom and temporary holding tank pumping for job sites across North Texas.
  • 🔬
    Regulated Waste Removal — Proper handling and disposal of regulated liquid waste streams in compliance with TCEQ requirements.
  • 📋
    Full Documentation — Every job includes proper manifests, disposal records, and documentation available for your compliance needs.

Our Commitment
to Compliance

  • ✓
    Licensed and permitted for environmental waste transport in Texas
  • ✓
    Disposal at TCEQ-permitted facilities only
  • ✓
    Waste manifests provided for every job
  • ✓
    Trained operators following proper handling procedures
  • ✓
    Spill prevention protocols in place on every job

North Texas Coverage

Based in Johnson County with service throughout the North Texas region. Expanding to Central Texas — contact us to discuss your location.

Industries We Serve

Built for Demanding Environments

🏭

Industrial Facilities

Manufacturing plants, processing facilities, and industrial operations requiring regular waste removal and documentation.

🏗️

Construction & Development

Active job sites requiring portable sanitation pumping and temporary holding tank service throughout the build cycle.

🏢

Commercial Properties

Office parks, retail centers, and commercial facilities with holding tanks or environmental waste needs.
